headline: Is Fortive (FTV) Still Attractively Priced After Recent Share Price Pullback?
summary: Wondering if Fortive is priced fairly today or if the stock still offers value at around US$59.02? This article breaks down what the current valuation really implies for you. Over the past week the share price is up 0.2%, despite being down 3.3% over the last 30 days, while returns stand at 6.6% year to date and 12.2% over the last year. Recent attention on Fortive has focused on how its portfolio of businesses and acquisition track record fit into broader industrial trends. This helps frame...
